tasks.subject: Task 1: Hub Panic Recovery Middleware and safeGo Helper
tasks.description:
Create RecoverMiddleware and SafeGo in internal/servicehttp/. Tests verify panic recovery and restart behavior.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/servicehttp/recover.go", "internal/servicehttp/recover_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./internal/servicehttp/ -run TestRecover|TestSafeGo -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["RecoverMiddleware catches panics and returns 500", "SafeGo recovers and restarts goroutines", "WaitGroup tracking works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Wire Hub Panic Recovery Into Critical Paths
tasks.description:
Apply RecoverMiddleware to HTTP handlers, recover in WS dispatcher, SafeGo for background loops, bound API key touch.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/labtether/startup_bootstrap.go", "cmd/labtether/agent_ws_handler.go", "cmd/labtether/startup_background.go", "cmd/labtether/main.go"], "verifyCommand": "go build ./cmd/labtether/", "acceptanceCriteria": ["RecoverMiddleware on all handlers", "WS dispatcher has panic recovery", "Background loops use SafeGo", "API key touch bounded"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Hub Database Resilience
tasks.description:
Enable pgx HealthCheckPeriod and add retryDB helper.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/persistence/postgres_schema.go", "internal/persistence/retry.go", "internal/persistence/retry_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./internal/persistence/ -run TestRetryDB -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["HealthCheckPeriod enabled", "retryDB works with backoff", "Context cancellation respected"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Hub Deeper Health Check
tasks.description:
Expand /healthz to return postgres status and goroutine count.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/servicehttp/servicehttp.go"], "verifyCommand": "go build ./cmd/labtether/", "acceptanceCriteria": ["/healthz returns postgres and goroutine info", "503 on DB failure"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Agent Panic Recovery
tasks.description:
Add panic recovery to all agent goroutine entry points with WaitGroup tracking.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/agentcore/safego.go", "internal/agentcore/safego_test.go", "internal/agentcore/command_handler.go", "internal/agentcore/ws_transport.go", "internal/agentcore/runtime.go"], "verifyCommand": "go build ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["All goroutine entry points have panic recovery", "WaitGroup handler tracking", "Semaphore on all handlers"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Agent Command Kill-on-Timeout
tasks.description:
Force-kill processes after timeout, add Docker exec 5-minute timeout.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/agentcore/remoteaccess/exec_ws.go", "internal/agentcore/docker/exec.go"], "verifyCommand": "go build ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Force-kill on timeout", "Docker exec has 5min timeout"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Agent Watchdog
tasks.description:
Watchdog detects stuck heartbeat and goroutine leaks.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/agentcore/watchdog.go", "internal/agentcore/watchdog_test.go", "internal/agentcore/runtime.go", "internal/agentcore/run.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./internal/agentcore/ -run TestWatchdog -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Stuck detection works", "Goroutine leak warning works", "Exit code 11 on stuck"]}
```
